caption: A video sequence shows a political event with an orange background. The top and bottom of the screen feature an orange border with white text in Hindi, "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस", accompanied by lotus logos. Small text in the corners reads "प्रजानेत्री" and "दिल्ली", and a lower banner displays "लाइव रैलें" alongside social media handles "@BJP4India" and a website address. The visuals alternate between two scenes: a close-up of Narendra Modi and a wider shot of several men seated together. Modi wears a white kurta, a white vest, and a saffron, green, and yellow scarf. In the wider shots, several men in traditional Indian attire sit in a row against a backdrop of repeating lotus logos. Between these shots, the scene cuts from Modi speaking and gesturing with his hands to the group of seated officials and back again.
